features: 【Superior Glass Bong】This water pipe is made of environmentally friendly and non-toxic high-grade borosilicate glass and hand-made at high temperature to make it more durable and not easy to break
【Upgraded Hookah pipe】This upgraded glass bong is specially designed with thickened glass to effectively enhance the surface hardness, prevent scratches and can be used repeatedly
【Efficient Circulation Filtration】The carefully selected unique designed spiral filter of this glass smoking bong provides you with unique tornado filtration, which is more convenient and efficient
【Ice Placement Design】The big bong is specially designed for ice cube placement. You can place the ice cubes in the appropriate position to cool it for a great experience.
【After-Sales Service】For this glass pipe, you will get 100% customer support. If the small bong is damaged, please feel free to contact us, we will replace it for free within 24 hours
description: Why choose the bongbongbong Glass Bong? Bongbongbong has been committed to providing consumers with great, innovative and durable water bong. The carefully selected materials guarantee absolute durability in daily use. We have our own factory, which can provide you with customized services Quality in Every Detail Bongbongbong places a high priority on bong pipe quality. Each glass bong has has been tested by dozens of processes to ensure the quality Ice Placement Design The glass bong is specially designed for ice cube placement. You can place the ice cubes in the appropriate position to cool it for a great experience Easy to Clean This glass bong bowl with bong cleaning brush is very easy to clean, you only need to use isopropyl alcohol and a little salt, and then rinse it with water After Sales Service For this water bong with bong cleaning brush, you will get 100% customer support. If you have any questions about glass bong, please feel free to contact us Tips Please keep the water bong away from the elderly and children to prevent the glass breakage and avoid accidents Specifications Material... Borosilicate glass Height...27cm/ 10.6in Bong Bowl...14.4-14.5mm Weight...400g
